meaning: n.代表adj.典型的,有代表性的
examples: He was the Queen's representative at the ceremony.
The survey covers a representative sample of schools.
He was in no way representative of dog trainers in general.
The element was inscribed on the Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in 2009.
Take the experience of one midsized textile manufacturer, representative of many sodden local businesses.
